calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender, and issuance of new birth certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: James McBride, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Petitioner Kathryn Eileen Caragol was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Kyl Elliot Caragol and Change of Gender from Female to Male.

Decree Changing Name and Gender, and issuance of new birth certificate was submitted to and signed by the Court.
